message:
perf(channel): BTreeSet to HashSet for partition controller lookups

PartitionController stores directed (src, dst) actor-pair partitions.
The only operations are insert, remove, and contains — none require
ordered iteration.  HashSet provides O(1) amortized for all three
versus BTreeSet's O(log n), and (u64, u64) tuples have a trivially
cheap hash.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
